street.description: Street or way the prohibition is on, as written (whitespace-collapsed). For the citywide blanket rules (prohibition_type fire_lane/bus_stop/football_game_day) this holds the categorical subject phrase (e.g. 'any fire lane') since there is no single geocodable street.

prohibition_type.description: Kind of prohibition. 'tow_away_zone' = the standard '(Tow-away zone)' / '(Tow-way zone)' entries; 'parking_prohibited' = the 'Parking prohibited' wording (Essex Road); 'fire_lane'/'bus_stop'/'football_game_day' = the three citywide blanket rules at the head of the list.

side.description: Side(s) of the street the zone applies to. Base compass plus diagonal bearings; multiple sides comma-joined in source order (e.g. 'north,west' for 'north and west side'). 'both' = both sides. Empty when the source states no side.

from_point.description: Start reference of the zone segment, as written (whitespace-collapsed): a cross street ('Hammond Street'), a measured point ('a point 340 feet west of Walnut Street'), a terminus ('its westerly terminus'), or an address/landmark ('31 Elmwood Street'). Empty when the zone is the whole street (see extent) or no segment is stated.

to_point.description: End reference of the zone segment, as written: a cross street, a measured point, a terminus, an address/landmark, or a city line ('Boston City Line'). Empty when the extent is given as a measured length from from_point (see length_feet/bearing) or no end is stated.

extent.description: Qualitative extent when the zone covers the whole way rather than a measured/endpoint segment. Only value observed: 'entire length'. Empty otherwise.

length_feet.description: Measured length of the zone in feet when stated as a distance running from from_point (e.g. 'from Hammond Street easterly 300 feet' -> 300; 'westerly 140 feet' -> 140). The orientation of that run goes in bearing. Empty when the segment is defined by two endpoints instead.

bearing.description: Orientation in which length_feet is measured from from_point: the '-erly' compass word normalized to a compass token. Empty when no measured length is given.

days.description: Days the prohibition applies; empty means every day / all days. 'Saturdays included' and 'including Sundays and Holidays' expand into the token set alongside the weekdays.

times.description: Time window(s) the prohibition applies, 24-hour. Empty means at all times. '12:00 midnight' normalizes to 00:00. Used for the applies-window; an 'except' window goes in time_exception.

time_exception.description: Time window during which the prohibition does NOT apply, 24-hour (the 'except HH:MM to HH:MM' form, e.g. Old Colony Road 'except 7:00 p.m. to 12:00 midnight' -> 19:00-00:00). Empty when there is no exception window.

location_detail.description: Segment/position qualifier the from_point/to_point/length atoms cannot hold (e.g. 'between off-ramp and on-ramp at Boylston Street', 'from exit driveway of Newton Post #440'). Never carries side, day, or time data.

notes.description: Extractor remarks about source-text anomalies only (typos like 'Tow-way', the Longfellow/Lothrup merged paragraph). Never carries regulation data.
